input.prompt: I want to run only the ReportExporterTests class using dotnet test, not the ReportGeneratorTests. How do I do that?

data.content: I want to run only the ReportExporterTests class using dotnet test, not the ReportGeneratorTests. How do I do that?
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-02T01:17:23.858Z</current_datetime>

I want to run only the ReportExporterTests class using dotnet test, not the ReportGeneratorTests. How do I do that?

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the ReportExporterTests class using dotnet test, not the ReportGeneratorTests. How do I do that?

data.reasoningText: The user wants to know how to run only a specific test class using `dotnet test`. Let me look at the test files to give accurate advice.

data.content:
Use the `--filter` option to filter by class name:

```bash
dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests
```

This matches any test whose fully qualified name contains `ReportExporterTests`, which will run `ExportToCsv_ValidReport_CreatesFile` and `ExportToSharePoint_Authenticated_Uploads` while skipping the `ReportGeneratorTests`.
